settings.heading: A fictional brand designed to feel market-ready.
settings.text: Lumae Skincare was created as a portfolio project to study Shopify in practice: product setup, collection architecture, Dawn customization, and brand communication.
settings.panel_text: The brand speaks to people who want a premium, focused, and trustworthy routine. The visual system uses restraint, breathing room, and direct messaging to support perceived value.

settings.title: Clarity
settings.text: Menus, sections, and pages guide customers by need and routine step.

settings.title: Trust
settings.text: Product details, ingredients, usage guidance, and policies appear before the cart.

settings.title: Finish
settings.text: Palette, spacing, and components were adjusted for an editorial result.

settings.heading: What guides the experience.
settings.text: The store was planned as a portfolio piece: polished to look at, but also coherent as an ecommerce experience.
